scenarioName: Mark a feature untested from the filesystem body

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Mark a feature untested from the filesystem body
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The system should generate a status sentinel `docs/features/_STATUS.implemented.not-tested.<feature-id>.md`, set specific JSON status fields (implementation status: implemented, execution proof status: proven, end-user QA status: not QAed, promotion status: not promoted), and recommend running the LLM end-user testing conveyor.
steps.observedResult: No actual system output or report was observed to verify the expected results. Only the Gherkin scenario describing the expected behavior was available.
